description_long: This object is a simple, stylized representation of a paper airplane, featuring a sharply pointed nose and broad, triangular wings that taper to the rear. The wings are flat and extend outward from a central crease, giving the airplane a classic delta shape. The surface appears smooth and unadorned, with visible fold lines running parallel to the leading edges and along the center. There are no visible engines, cockpit, or landing gear, emphasizing its minimalistic and lightweight design. The entire object is a uniform light gray color, resembling the appearance of folded paper. Its structure is thin and flat, with no internal volume or compartments.
description: A light gray, sharply pointed paper airplane with broad, flat triangular wings and a smooth, folded surface. The design is minimalistic, resembling a classic paper glider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose and symmetrical triangular wings with a central crease.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, flat profile and the slight upward angle of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide trailing edge and the central fold running from nose to tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flatness and wing taper.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Delta wing configuration with a single, continuous, flat wing surface and no dihedral or anhedral angle; no winglets present.
attribute_tail_design: No distinct tail section; the rear of the airplane tapers to a point as part of the delta wing.
